manifest_claim: The segment shows FBF and Kamino preserving the 25-stone arch through impact while MuJoCo slumps and collapses.
remaining_blockers: The current-source clip is a no-projectile stability time-lapse, not the paper impact segment.
The source-equivalent camera/timeline, approved golden and diff, and faithful Kamino and MuJoCo clips are unavailable.

claims.claim: The segment shows FBF and Kamino preserving the 25-stone arch through impact while MuJoCo slumps and collapses.
claims.support: The clip supports only a reconstructed pre-impact DART stability observation. It does not contain impact or external-solver comparisons and therefore does not establish the full manifest claim.
